query:
-- Funding Sources table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS funding_sources (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  type ENUM('grant', 'contract', 'internal', 'donation', 'revenue') NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  funderName VARCHAR(255),
  totalBudget DECIMAL(15, 2),
  laborBudget DECIMAL(15, 2),
  startDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  endDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  status ENUM('active', 'pending', 'closed', 'expired') DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL,
  requiresTimeTracking BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  reportingFrequency ENUM('weekly', 'biweekly', 'monthly', 'quarterly', 'annually') DEFAULT 'monthly',
  entityId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Charge Codes table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS charge_codes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  fundingSourceId INT,
  projectId INT,
  departmentId INT,
  entityId INT,
  budgetedHours DECIMAL(10, 2),
  hourlyRate DECIMAL(10, 2),
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  isBillable BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  requiresApproval BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  allowOvertime BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  startDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  endDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Timekeeping Workers table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS timekeeping_workers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT,
  employeeId INT,
  contractorId INT,
  workerType ENUM('employee', 'contractor', 'volunteer') NOT NULL,
  firstName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  lastName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320),
  departmentId INT,
  entityId INT,
  supervisorId INT,
  defaultChargeCodeId INT,
  hourlyRate DECIMAL(10, 2),
  standardHoursPerWeek DECIMAL(5, 2) DEFAULT 40.00,
  overtimeEligible BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'terminated') DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL,
  hireDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  terminationDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Worker Charge Code Assignments table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS worker_charge_code_assignments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  workerId INT NOT NULL,
  chargeCodeId INT NOT NULL,
  assignedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  assignedBy INT,
  maxHoursPerWeek DECIMAL(5, 2),
  effectiveFrom TIMESTAMP NULL,
  effectiveTo TIMESTAMP NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL
);
